description: Mandatory-grounding protocol policy for high-risk responder guidance that must be fetched from Vertex before communication may present step-by-step instructions.

cpr.title: CPR Guidance
cpr.communication_message: I have the CPR steps ready. Start with the first step now.

airway_breathing_check.title: Airway and Breathing Check
airway_breathing_check.communication_message: I have the breathing-check steps ready. Follow them now.

response_check.title: Response Check
response_check.communication_message: I have the responsiveness-check steps ready. Follow them now.

bleeding_control.title: Bleeding Control
bleeding_control.communication_message: I have the bleeding-control steps ready. Start with the first step now.

spinal_precautions.title: Spinal Precautions
spinal_precautions.communication_message: I have the spinal-precaution steps ready. Follow them carefully now.

waiting_for_help.title: Waiting for Help
waiting_for_help.communication_message: I have the waiting-for-help steps ready. Keep following them while you stay with the patient.
